itemdesc-quill: A quill for writing on maps
blockdesc-cartographytable-*:
Take the quill by rightmouse-clicking on the ink and quill.

Hold rightmouse on the map while holding a quill to transcribe your waypoints onto the table map, or hold ctrl + rightmouse on the map while holding a quill to transcribe the table map waypoints onto your map.

Hold rightmouse on the map while holding a knife to scrape it clean.
blockdesc-advancedcartographytable-*:
Take the quill by rightmouse-clicking on the ink and quill.

Hold rightmouse on the map while holding a quill to transcribe your waypoints and explored areas onto the table map, or hold ctrl + rightmouse on the map while holding a quill to transcribe the table map waypoints and explored areas onto your map.

Hold rightmouse on the map while holding a knife to scrape it clean.

gamemechanicinfo-sharingwaypoints-title: Game Mechanic: Sharing Waypoints and Maps
gamemechanicinfo-sharingwaypoints-text:
Cartography Table

A cartography table can be crafted using a wooden table, a parchment, and an ink and quill. Once the cartography table is placed, take the quill by rightmouse-clicking on the ink and quill, then rightmouse-click on the map while holding the quill to transcribe your changes onto the table, or ctrl + rightmouse-click on the map while holding the quill to transcribe the changes made by others onto your map.

Each table has its own map, with a unique set of waypoints, allowing different groups to use different tables and share waypoints only within their group.

Transcribing onto the table map

When you transcribe onto the table map:

- the waypoints you added to your map will be copied onto the cartography table
- the waypoints you edited on your map will be updated on the cartography table
- the waypoints you deleted from your map will be deleted from the cartography table

Transcribing onto your map

When you transcribe onto your map:

- the new waypoints on the cartography table will be added to your map
- the changed waypoints on the cartography table will be updated on your map
- the deleted waypoints on the cartography table will be removed from your map

Advanced Cartography Table

An advanced cartography table can be crafted using two wooden tables, two parchments, an ink and quill, and a candle. The advanced cartography table allows you to share explored areas in addition to waypoints, and also acts as a light source thanks to the candle.
gamemechanicinfo-pondering-text:
Introduction

By rightmouse-clicking on the map of a cartography table or an advanced cartography table while holding a palantir, you can travel in spirit to faraway lands, known or unknown.

Preparing for Travel

First, craft a palantir and a cartography table or an advanced cartography table. Place the table and gather some psychedelic mushrooms. Open your map and place palantir travel waypoints (eye icon) in the places you wish to see, then transcribe the new waypoints onto the cartography table map.

Astral Projection

Once your preparations are complete, eat a psychedelic mushroom and ponder the cartography table map by rightmouse-clicking on it while holding a palantir to begin your journey.
config-setting-immersivemode-comment: When immersive mode is enabled, no messages will be displayed in the game chat while using the cartography table.
config-setting-chunksperpacket-comment: How many map chunks to transcribe at once. Increasing this will make the transcription faster but could cause server or client overloads.
config-setting-packetdelay-comment: How many seconds to wait between packets. Decreasing this will make the transcription faster but could cause server or client overloads.
config-setting-waypointdownload-comment: If disabled you won't transcribe any waypoints to your map.
config-setting-waypointupload-comment: If disabled you won't transcribe any waypoints to the cartography table.
